title: 9 Herbal Creams For Difficult Speaking
description: Rosmarinus officinalis creams contains rosmarinic acid and carnosic acid, two active constituents with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These compounds help reduce inflammation and swelling in the throat and vocal cords, making it easier to speak. Rosmarinus officinalis creams also contains eucalyptol, which is a natural decongestant that can help clear mucus from the airways. The anti-inflammatory properties of rosmarinic acid can also help soothe a sore throat and reduce...
